name: Social Fundraising
tagline: Building brotherhood, raising funds, and creating moments members will remember.
overview: The Social Fundraising committee produces three signature annual events that fund E100's mission while building Atlanta community. Cocktails & Conversations (March), Park 100 at Park Tavern (Labor Day weekend), and the Holiday Soiree at Coca-Cola Roxy (December). Party with a purpose — every event is an experience and a revenue engine. 3,700+ attendees annually.
